channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 11b23f7a-6229-4518-88db-0576f10dd2a0
Display name: Container Apps SandboxGroup Contributor
Description: Full management of Container Apps Sandbox Groups, including creation, deletion, and updates.
Link: https://management.azure.com/11b23f7a-6229-4518-88db-0576f10dd2a0?api-version=2022-04-01
